en: A SONG. A PSALM OF THE SONS OF KORAH. TO THE CHOIRMASTER: ACCORDING TO MAHALATH LEANNOTH. A MASKIL OF HEMAN THE EZRAHITE. O LORD, God of my salvation; I cry out day and night before you.
zh: 耶和華、拯救我的 神啊！ 我晝夜都在你面前哀求。

en: Let my prayer come before you; incline your ear to my cry!
zh: 願我的禱告達到你面前， 求你留心聽我的呼求。

en: For my soul is full of troubles, and my life draws near to Sheol.
zh: 因為我飽經憂患， 我的性命臨近陰間。

en: I am counted among those who go down to the pit; I am a man who has no strength,
zh: 我被列在下坑的人中， 就像一個沒有氣力的人一樣。

en: like one set loose among the dead, like the slain that lie in the grave, like those whom you remember no more, for they are cut off from your hand.
zh: 我被棄在死人之中， 好像被殺的人躺在墳墓裡； 你不再記念他們， 他們也和你 隔絕了。

en: You have put me in the depths of the pit, in the regions dark and deep.
zh: 你把我放在最深的坑裡， 把我放在黑暗的地方和深淵裡。

en: Your wrath lies heavy upon me, and you overwhelm me with all your waves. Selah
zh: 你的烈怒重重地壓著我， 你的波浪從四方八面把我淹蓋。

en: You have caused my companions to shun me; you have made me a horror to them. I am shut in so that I cannot escape;
zh: 你使我的知己都遠離我， 使我成為他們所厭惡的。 我被囚禁，不能外出。

en: my eye grows dim through sorrow. Every day I call upon you, O LORD; I spread out my hands to you.
zh: 我的眼睛因困苦而昏花； 耶和華啊，我天天向你呼求， 向你舉手禱告。

en: Do you work wonders for the dead? Do the departed rise up to praise you? Selah
zh: 你要為死人行奇事嗎？ 陰魂會起來稱謝你嗎？

en: Is your steadfast love declared in the grave, or your faithfulness in Abaddon?
zh: 在墳墓裡有人述說你的慈愛嗎？ 在滅亡之地 有人述說你的信實嗎？

en: Are your wonders known in the darkness, or your righteousness in the land of forgetfulness?
zh: 你的奇事在黑暗裡有人知道嗎？ 你的公義在那遺忘之地有人知道嗎？

en: But I, O LORD, cry to you; in the morning my prayer comes before you.
zh: 耶和華啊！我卻向你呼求， 我的禱告在早晨達到你面前。

en: O LORD, why do you cast my soul away? Why do you hide your face from me?
zh: 耶和華啊！你為甚麼丟棄我？ 為甚麼掩面不顧我？

en: Afflicted and close to death from my youth up, I suffer your terrors; I am helpless.
zh: 我自幼受苦，幾乎死亡； 我受了你的驚嚇，以致困惑不安 。

en: Your wrath has swept over me; your dreadful assaults destroy me.
zh: 你的烈怒把我淹沒， 你的驚嚇把我除滅。

en: They surround me like a flood all day long; they close in on me together.
zh: 這些終日像水一樣環繞我， 一起把我圍困。

en: You have caused my beloved and my friend to shun me; my companions have become darkness.
zh: 你使我摯愛的和同伴都遠離我， 黑暗成了我的知己。
